---
name: Bug Report
about: Report unexpected behavior or a crash
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

**Describe the bug**

A clear and concise description of what is wrong.

**Command used**

```
codex-genome analyze <path>
```

**Expected behavior**

What you expected to happen.

**Actual behavior**

What actually happened. Paste the full output or error message.

**Environment**

- OS: <!-- e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11, macOS 14 -->
- Go version: <!-- e.g. 1.23.0 -->
- Codex Genome version: <!-- e.g. v0.1.0 or commit SHA -->

**Additional context**

Any other context that might help — directory size, unusual filenames, permission setup, etc.
